steps.title: Choose your foundation
steps.description: Pick race, birthsign, deity, traits, major/minor skills, and attribute choices.

steps.title: Spend your points
steps.description: Allocate perks, raise skill levels, train skills, and plan destiny as you level up.

steps.title: Save and revisit
steps.description: Builds auto-save locally. Create level variants, export backups, or share a compact code.

features.title: Character Setup
features.description: Configure every starting choice with live validation against LoreRim rules and race bonuses.

features.title: Full Perk Trees
features.description: Every skill tree with prerequisite chains, skill requirements, player level gates, and rank tracking.

features.title: Destiny & Training
features.description: Plan destiny points and skill training alongside perk points and tiered skill point costs.

features.title: Build Variants
features.description: Capture snapshots at key levels to map your leveling path without losing your main plan.

features.title: Live Combat Stats
features.description: Health, magicka, stamina, and tracked bonuses update as you change race, perks, and attributes.

features.title: Share & Backup
features.description: Compact build codes, planner links, and .gpp backups — import anytime from the builds page.

landing.recentBuildsEmpty: No saved builds yet. Open the planner and your work is saved automatically.
landing.importDescription: Paste a share code to load it directly in the planner.

milestones.title: Variants
milestones.emptyHint: Capture how this build should look at key levels along the way.

level-bar.perkPointsInfo: You start with {initial} perk points and get {perLevel} more each level to spend on perks.
level-bar.skillPointsInfo: You get {perLevel} skill points each level to raise skill levels beyond what you train for free.
level-bar.trainingLevelsInfo: You earn {perLevel} training levels per player level ({total} at level {playerLevel}). Training raises skill levels without spending skill points.
level-bar.trainingOverBudgetAlert: You have {used} trained skill levels but only {earned} are allowed at level {playerLevel}. Lower skills or raise your level to {required}.
level-bar.perkOverBudgetAlert: You have spent {count} more perk point(s) than earned at level {playerLevel}. Raise your level or remove perks.
level-bar.destinyOverBudgetAlert: You have spent {count} more destiny point(s) than earned at level {playerLevel}. Raise your level or remove destiny perks.
level-bar.skillOverBudgetAlert: You have spent {count} more skill point(s) than earned at level {playerLevel}. Lower skills or raise your level.
level-bar.playerLevelSkillCapSingle: {skill} is level {skillLevel}, but the max at level {playerLevel} is {maxAllowed}. Lower the skill or raise your level.
level-bar.playerLevelSkillCapMultiple: {count} skills exceed the max allowed at level {playerLevel}. Lower those skills or raise your level.
level-bar.playerLevelSkillIncreaseSingle: {skill} is level {skillLevel}, which requires player level {required} (you are level {playerLevel}). Raise your level or lower the skill.
level-bar.playerLevelSkillIncreaseMultiple: {count} skills exceed the per-level skill gain limit at player level {playerLevel}. Raise your level or lower those skills.
level-bar.playerLevelPerkReqSingle: {perk} requires player level {required} (you are level {playerLevel}). Raise your level or remove the perk.
level-bar.playerLevelPerkReqMultiple: {count} selected perks require a higher player level than {playerLevel}.
level-bar.skillReqConflictSingle: {perk} requires skill level {required} (your skill is {current}). Raise the skill or remove the perk.
level-bar.skillReqConflictMultiple: {count} selected perks require a higher skill level than you have. Raise the skill or remove perks.
level-bar.playerLevelWarningMixed: Some skills, perks, and attribute choices exceed limits at level {playerLevel}. Adjust your build or raise your level.
level-bar.playerLevelAttributeOverBudgetSingle: 1 attribute choice exceeds what's allowed at level {playerLevel}. Remove choices or raise your level.
level-bar.playerLevelAttributeOverBudgetMultiple: {count} attribute choices exceed what's allowed at level {playerLevel}. Remove choices or raise your level.
level-bar.buildIssuesAlertMobile: Your build has {count} {issues}. Tap to see more.
level-bar.buildIssuesAlertDesktop: Your build has {count} {issues}. Hover to see more.
level-bar.setToMinimumLevelInfo: Set player level to the lowest level that supports your current perks, skills, attribute choices, and point spending.
level-bar.ensurePlayerLevelInfo: Raise player level to satisfy skill caps, training, skill gain limits, perk level requirements, and perk/skill point spending.
level-bar.easyModeLevelWarning: Levels above {standardMax} are only for Lorerim's easy mode.

character-options.title: Character Options
character-options.subtitle: Optional bonuses earned during your playthrough.
character-options.oghmaDescription: Grants 3 bonus perk points and makes the top 5 levels free in six chosen skill trees.
character-options.oghmaSkillLevels: +{count} free levels (top of each chosen skill)
character-options.auNaturelGearDescription: How many armor or clothing pieces you wear (head, chest, hands, feet). Each empty slot grants +1 health, magicka, and stamina per player level.
character-options.auNaturelPerLevelBonus: +{count} to health, magicka, and stamina ({emptySlots} empty slots × level {level})
character-options.alduinBonusTraitDescription: Grants one additional trait on the Traits page.

variants-manager.title: Manage Variants
variants-manager.createHint: Start a fresh variant at level 1 with default setup.

skill-trees.title: Skill Trees
skill-trees.skillReqConflictSingle: {perk} requires skill level {required} (your skill is {current}). Raise the skill or remove the perk.
skill-trees.skillReqConflictMultiple: {count} selected perks require a higher skill level than you have. Raise the skill or remove perks.
skill-trees.skillLevelOverCapSingle: {skill} is level {skillLevel}, but the max at your level is {maxAllowed}. Lower the skill or raise your level.
skill-trees.skillLevelIncreaseOverLimitSingle: {skill} is level {skillLevel}, which requires player level {required} (you are level {playerLevel}). Raise your level or lower the skill.
skill-trees.playerLevelPerkConflictSingle: {perk} requires player level {required} (you are level {playerLevel}). Raise your level or remove the perk.
skill-trees.playerLevelPerkConflictMultiple: {count} selected perks require a higher player level than {playerLevel}.
skill-trees.destinyOverBudgetSingle: {perk} exceeds your destiny point budget at level {playerLevel}. Raise your level or remove the perk.
skill-trees.destinyOverBudgetMultiple: {count} selected destiny perks exceed your destiny point budget at level {playerLevel}. Raise your level or remove perks.

build-library.title: My Builds
build-library.subtitle: Manage, share, import, and export your saved character builds.
build-library.shareCodeDescription: Compact codes for sharing a build in chat, forums, or planner links.
build-library.backupDescription: Save or restore builds as {extension} files on this device or another.
build-library.importedAsNew: Build imported as a new slot.
build-library.importedVersionWarning: This build was shared from {sourceVersion}, but this planner is on {currentVersion}. Some perks or setup choices may differ.
build-library.importedVersionMismatchError: This build was shared from {sourceVersion}, but this planner is on {currentVersion}. Major modpack changes may have affected this build.
build-library.storageUsageWarning: Storage is getting full. Export or delete builds to free space.
build-library.storageUsageCritical: Storage is nearly full. Export or delete builds before saving more.
